---
name: 🎮 New Tic-Tac-Toe Game
about: Start a new round of Tic-Tac-Toe against the computer
title: "Tic-Tac-Toe: New Round"
labels: tictactoe
---

A Tic-Tac-Toe game board will be initialized the moment this issue is created.
Comment with a coordinate (e.g., `B2`, `2,2`, or `A1`) to place your first ❌. Good luck! 🕹️
